channel.title: Elite Golf Physical Therapy — Articles
channel.description: Golf health and performance articles from Elite Golf Physical Therapy, a TPI Medical Level 3 certified golf physical therapist in San Diego.

item.title: Hip Mobility for Golf: More Rotation, More Distance
item.description: Stiff hips quietly cost you distance and strain your back and knees. Here's how a golf PT evaluation finds the real cause of limited hip mobility.

item.title: Golf and Lower Back Pain: Finding the Root Cause
item.description: Lower back pain is the most common golf injury, and usually a symptom, not the cause. Here's why the swing hurts your back, and how a PT evaluation finds the real root cause.
